title: Human Reports, Machine Output, Terminal Width, and Accessibility · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for human reports, machine output, terminal width, and accessibility and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, filesystem, terminal, packaging, operating-system, load, security, and release transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for accessible human and machine report system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Order title, input identity, policy, totals, rankings, limitations, and next actions around the reader decision.
Reserve stdout for requested report data and stderr for diagnostics while keeping exit status consistent.
Use a declared width or detected terminal width with minimums, wrapping, long-token policy, and snapshot tests.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-bookbot-python cumulative Unicode-safe text-analysis portfolio.

Browser execution uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure-Python models only.
Host files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, package installation, native profiling, load,
operating-system races, publication, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TextPolicy:
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    normalization: str = "NFC"
    casefold: bool = True
    top_k: int = 10


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    corpus_id: str
    revision: str
    policy_version: str
    command_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Bookbot portfolio ready"

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Structured Alternative
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Bookbot team handles case 5884 during a multilingual community archive intake. Build deterministic Python evidence to format a reflowable report with separated diagnostics, no color-only meaning, and structured alternatives; keep stdout machine-safe, diagnostics on stderr, status explicit, and every signal understandable without color; then introduce an equal-frequency tie and prove the secondary ranking key is stable. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Provide labeled rows, deterministic plain text, and machine-readable output as equivalent evidence rather than screenshots.

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Structured Alternative
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Structured Alternative: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Bookbot team handles case 6789 during a clean-environment package release. Build deterministic Python evidence to format a reflowable report with separated diagnostics, no color-only meaning, and structured alternatives; record the first failed boundary, causal evidence, repair, regression test, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then replace an ASCII word with a canonically equivalent combining sequence and compare the declared counts. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Provide labeled rows, deterministic plain text, and machine-readable output as equivalent evidence rather than screenshots.

Evidence target: Bookbot and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Structured Alternative.
steps.why: Retrieving Structured Alternative through the concrete accessible human and machine report system case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Bookbot and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Structured Alternative, keep Structured Alternative connected to executable Python text-analysis, command, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Provide labeled rows, deterministic plain text, and machine-readable output as equivalent evidence rather than screenshots.
